title: Junior Product Marketing Manager
summary: Candidate brings solid B2B product marketing fundamentals (GTM strategy, cross-functional collaboration, project management) that partially transfer to this role. However, the position is highly specialized in mobile app store operations and gaming live-ops, areas where the candidate has no demonstrated experience. The seniority fit is reasonable given the 'Junior' title, but the domain gap is significant.
required_skills: App store optimization or store merchandising
matched_skills: B2B marketing experience (4+ years, GTM strategy, product positioning)
missing_skills: App store optimization (ASO) or store merchandising — no evidence in CV
Mobile gaming industry experience or demonstrated passion
In-App Event planning and publishing (Apple App Store / Google Play)
Live-ops marketing or gaming-specific promotional experience
Creative copywriting for consumer-facing game content
core_responsibilities: Own Store In-App Events end-to-end across Apple App Store and Google Play
Plan, create, and publish Store In-App Events aligned with live-ops and product updates
Partner cross-functionally with Product, Live Ops, and Creative teams
Shape app store presence and ensure consistent, impactful messaging
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any personal interest or experience in mobile gaming, even casual, to address the passion requirement
Frame GTM execution experience as directly transferable to app store go-to-market and launch communication
Emphasize cross-functional project coordination (Hapag-Lloyd, ECE) to demonstrate ability to work with Product, Creative, and Live Ops teams
Position JIRA/Confluence and Agile experience prominently to satisfy the project management tools requirement
Showcase any creative or consumer-facing writing samples from past roles (collateral, demo scripts, trade fair materials)
risk_flags: No app store or ASO experience — this is a core job function, not a nice-to-have
No mobile gaming background; role explicitly states passion for gaming as a requirement
All prior marketing experience is B2B; this role involves consumer-facing (B2C) store content creation
Live-ops marketing is a specialized discipline absent from the candidate's profile
